title: President
highlights: Leading and coordinating activities of the official student body of the CSE Department at BAUST
Organizing programming contests, technical workshops, seminars, hackathons, and project showcase events
Promoting research, innovation, and collaboration among CSE students
Encouraging student participation in competitions, academic projects, and innovation programs
Mentoring junior students in programming, research, and academic development

title: Organizing Secretary
highlights: Managing logistics and execution of programming contests, workshops, and seminars
Coordinating club members and volunteers for technical events
Ensuring smooth organization of club activities and student engagement

title: Private Tutor
highlights: Providing personalized tutoring in programming, mathematics, and academic subjects
Teaching C programming, algorithms, data structures, competitive programming, and software development
Designing structured learning plans, practice exercises, and coding assignments
Mentoring students in coursework, programming assignments, and exam preparation

title: National Undergraduate Mathematics Olympiad Organizer
highlights: Organized the National Undergraduate Mathematics Olympiad hosted at BAUST
Coordinated the Mathematics Olympiad Preliminary Contest and participant management
Handled event logistics including venue preparation, scheduling, and coordination

title: Event Organizer (ICPC Preliminary)
highlights: Organized and managed the ICPC Preliminary Competition at BAUST
Coordinated contest logistics, participant registration, and technical arrangements

title: Assistant Organizing Secretary
highlights: Coordinated departmental events, technical workshops, and seminars
Assisted in organizing hackathons, project showcases, and academic activities

title: Assistant Organizing Secretary
highlights: Supported organization of technical competitions and academic events
Managed logistics, scheduling, and participant coordination

title: Competitive Programming Event Organizer
highlights: Planned and organized multiple competitive programming contests
Handled problem setting, contest scheduling, and participant registrations

title: Programming Instructor
organization: BAUST Computer Club / Department of CSE, BAUST
highlights: Taught C programming to junior students at BAUST
Mentored students in coding, debugging, and problem-solving techniques
Designed hands-on programming exercises and practice sessions

title: Programming Contest Participant
highlights: Participated in several programming contests organized by CSE Society, BAUST
Engaged in competitive problem-solving and algorithmic challenges

title: Organizing Executive
highlights: Assisted in planning and executing departmental events, workshops, and seminars
Facilitated student engagement in academic and extracurricular activities

title: Former Debater & Member
highlights: Participated in inter-college debating competitions
Contributed to debate training sessions and discussions

title: Former Member
highlights: Participated in science-related activities and academic events

title: Best Scout Award

title: Former President
